meanings.definition: cut down on; make a reduction in
examples: The employer wants to cut back health benefits

meanings.definition: cut with sweeping strokes; as with an ax or machete
cause to come or go down
examples: The policeman downed the heavily armed suspect
The mugger knocked down the old lady after she refused to hand over her wallet

meanings.definition: cut with a blade or mower
cause to fall by or as if by delivering a blow
